title: Deparia × lobatocrenata
taxonomy: Deparia × lobatocrenata is a hybrid species in the genus Deparia, which is a genus of ferns in the family Woodsiaceae. The classification of Deparia × lobatocrenata is as follows: it is a nothospecies of the genus Deparia, specifically a hybrid between Deparia acrostichoides and Deparia lobophylla. This hybrid fern is known to be a complex and rare species. The classification is based on its unique characteristics and the results of genetic studies. The species is considered a rare and interesting example of the diversity within the genus Deparia.
uses: Deparia × lobatocrenata, being a hybrid of Deparia acrostichoides and Deparia japonica, has been reported to have potential medicinal properties.
